description: Send notifications to your own LaMetric destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise lametrics:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a LaMetric device notification JSON body and post it to your LaMetric device API (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-lametric

request.template: {"urls":"lametrics://${ customer_secrets.LAMETRIC_APIKEY }@${ customer_secrets.LAMETRIC_HOST }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"lametrics://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"model":{"cycles":1,"frames":[{"icon":0,"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}]}}
{"model":{"cycles":1,"frames":[{"icon":0,"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}]}}
